summary: Auth flow testing complete. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend auth flow verified: landing page loads correctly, OAuth redirect works, ProtectedRoute handles both authenticated and unauthenticated users correctly, AuthContext initializes from localStorage synchronously.
passed_tests: ✅ /api/auth/me - Returns user data with valid Bearer token
✅ Frontend: Landing page loads with Login/SignUp buttons
✅ Frontend: 'Get Started Free' redirects to Emergent OAuth
✅ Frontend: ProtectedRoute allows authenticated users to /dashboard
✅ Frontend: ProtectedRoute redirects unauthenticated users to /
✅ Frontend: AuthContext initializes from localStorage synchronously
✅ Frontend: Console logs show '[AuthContext] Initial state from localStorage'

critical_code_review_comments.comment: Good implementation: getInitialState() reads from localStorage synchronously before React renders, preventing flash of unauthenticated state.
Good implementation: Checks localStorage as fallback when context shows not authenticated, handles race condition with 100ms delay.
Good implementation: 50ms delay before navigation allows React state to settle, preventing race condition.
Good implementation: Request interceptor adds Bearer token from localStorage to all API requests.
Good implementation: Checks both cookies and Authorization header for session token.

test_credentials: Test user created via mongosh with session_token: test_session_1774375385316 (cleaned up after testing)
seed_data_creation: Created test user and session via mongosh for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth flow is fully working. Key components: AuthContext.js (synchronous localStorage init), ProtectedRoute.js (race condition handling), AuthCallback.js (50ms delay before navigation), api.js (Bearer token interceptor), security.py (checks both cookies and Authorization header). Backend uses Emergent OAuth for Google login. Test user creation pattern: use mongosh to create user with user_id, email, name, created_at (ISO string), and session with session_token, user_id, expires_at.
